title: equisetum ramosissimum var. dolosum
intro: Equisetum ramosissimum var. dolosum, also known as Chinese horsetail, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the horsetail family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Equisetum ramosissimum var. dolosum include reducing blood pressure, improving kidney function, and alleviating symptoms of urinary tract infections. Equisetum ramosissimum var. dolosum can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, although its safety and efficacy have not been extensively studied in Western medicine.
